title: Desires Echoes of Creation
description:
Pathfinder 2e helpers for the Echoes of Creation campaign: chat context actions for Steady the Line (Hellknight Banner) and Echo Fragment rerolls, plus a built-in Item compendium (Echoes of Creation Items) with the Banner, Echo Fragment, Sovereign Amber (dormant and awakened), and linked aura / Temporal Infusion effects. Item slugs match module settings defaults: hellknight-banner, echo-fragment, sovereign-amber, sovereign-amber-awakened.

Verified environment: Foundry v13 Stable (build 351) and Pathfinder Second Edition system 7.12.2.

Art is shipped under assets/; item images use modules/desires-echoes-of-creation/... paths.

Rebuild compendium (developers): after editing JSON in packs/desires-echoes-items-src/, run npm install --omit=dev in tools/fvtt-cli/package, then node tools/build-eoc-compendium.mjs from the repo root.

Repository: github.com/sjoerddz/Age-of-Ashes-Echoes-of-Creation-Module. Publishing steps: PUBLISHING.md. Official docs: Publisher Handbook, Module development.
